purpose: Compact diagnostic record for the 2026-07-08 attempt to extend QPSK OTA qualification with the timing-sweep bitstream.
conclusion: The ExtraTimingOpt payload stayed valid on detected RF bursts, but the Windows RTL-SDR/libusb capture path was not stable enough for strict longer-series qualification. Keep the 2026-07-07 three-session OTA result as the external RF signoff baseline until the RTL-SDR transport is stabilized or replaced.

sync_long_100_burst_attempt.strict_qualification: fail: detector did not find all commanded bursts

sync_30_burst_attempt.strict_qualification: fail: one commanded burst was not correlated

async_30_burst_attempt.fatal_error: rtlsdr_read_async failed with rc=-5 after 31457280 bytes

next_action: Retry long OTA qualification after resetting/replugging RTL-SDR USB, moving to a different USB controller/cable/hub, or using a stable rtl_sdr/WSL/usbipd capture backend.
